AdditionalAttributes.description:
Turn your everyday meal into a gourmet delight with Abbott's Bakery Sourdough Rye Bread. Enjoy the inviting aroma and scrumptious texture of this delicious sourdough loaf. We’ve taken the mild sourdough flavour you love, added a hint of earthiness from rye flour, and dusted the crust with wheat semolina for a beautiful golden-brown finish.

It has a 4 Health Star Rating, is made with Australian wheat and contains no artificial colours, flavours or preservatives. The bag uses 30% recycled plastic, so your favourite sourdough rye works harder for you and the environment.

Key Features

  • No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives

  • 4 Health Star Rating

  • Made with Australian wheat

  • This bag is made with 30% recycled plastic

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Our buttery, light, soft and slightly sweet Brioche Sliders are the perfect sliders for pulled pork and crunchy vegetable slaw.

Create perfect mini gourmet burgers or mini BLT’s for your next get together with family and friends. Perfect to serve just heated through as mini-rolls for brunch, with soup or enjoyed with any meal.

About Us

Our love of brioche began in 1945 in a French boulangerie, where our family began creating delicious artisanal brioche. Nestled in the countryside of western France, we passed down our family recipes, mastering the perfect brioche: a soft, fluffy, slightly sweet bread that brings joy with every bite.

For four generations, we’ve been baking wholesome brioche breads in France and today, we are delighted to bring our classic French bread to households across Australia. Our original family recipes remain true, and so does our passion for our craft, which inspires every brioche we bake today.

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Abbott’s Bakery Harvest Seeds and Grain Bread is packed with canola seeds, linseeds, sunflower seeds and sesame seeds for extra pop in every slice. Toast it and you’ll hear the seeds crackle while the sesame seed topping adds a roasted nutty flavour. This seed and grain bread loaf is high in fibre, made with Australian wheat and provides 8.5 g of protein per serving, with no artificial colours, flavours or preservatives. The bag is made with 30% recycled plastic for a loaf that tastes good and does a little more for the planet.

Key Features

  • No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives.

  • Made with Australian wheat

  • High in fibre

  • 8.5 g of protein per serving

  • This bag is made with 30% recycled plastic.
